analysis agent
law waves are in coordinated secure communications — every wave is a numbered, receipted, depth-capped hop inside the team/comms envelope (`waveInSecureComms`); a team-scoped [[realtime]] emit is allowed only when scope-tenant matches, `eventUuid` recomputes, depth stays below `MAX_BROADCAST_DEPTH`, and (when a team is in scope) the agent is the team presence or a member — otherwise fail-closed with a [[receipt]].
